idea: promote LHS tensor map to L2_128B
justification: baseline ncu shows occupancy-limited small shape; modest L2 help may reduce refill latency without changing structure

idea: promote LHS and metadata tensor maps to L2_256B
justification: small M/N may benefit from reusing compact lhs/meta descriptors in L2

idea: add __launch_bounds__(384,1) to constrain occupancy model
justification: single-block occupancy may benefit from explicit compiler residency guidance

idea: promote both RHS tensor maps to L2_128B
justification: tiny N implies rhs tiles are small enough for reuse in L2

idea: tighten warpgroup wait depth from 1 to 0
justification: latency bias may help this occupancy-limited kernel

idea: insert producer nanosleep(100) after full-stage barrier arrival
justification: producer pacing can reduce pressure with one resident block per SM

idea: port META_TILE_COLS=8 plus double producer nanosleep from 4096x4096 winner
justification: winning K=4096 square-shape structure may transfer to this smaller square-like regime

idea: promote output tensor map to L2_256B
justification: small output tile may benefit from write-side locality hints

idea: insert producer nanosleep(100) after metadata barrier arrival
justification: brief delay may align subsequent TMA issue after metadata arrival

idea: remove output shared-memory padding
justification: tiny N can change bank-conflict tradeoffs; retest pad removal

idea: relax warpgroup wait depth from 1 to 2
justification: deeper overlap may help despite low occupancy

idea: insert producer nanosleep(200) after full-stage barrier arrival
justification: stronger pacing may further reduce shared-memory contention

idea: port META_TILE_COLS=8 with single producer nanosleep(200)
justification: retain winning meta expansion while simplifying pacing

idea: increase output shared-memory padding to 16
justification: alternate stride can avoid store-bank hot spots

idea: insert producer nanosleep(200) after metadata barrier arrival
justification: more slack after metadata arrival may align paired TMA issue

idea: port META_TILE_COLS=8 without producer nanosleep
justification: isolate meta-tiling effect from the 4096-square winner

idea: promote all tensor maps to L2_256B
justification: aggressive L2 hint sweep for tiny working set

idea: increase output shared-memory padding to 32
justification: wider smem stride changes store bank mapping again

idea: port double-nanosleep structure but revert META_TILE_COLS to 4
justification: tests whether pacing, not larger meta tiles, drove the 4096-square improvement

idea: promote metadata tensor map to L2_256B only
justification: metadata footprint is tiny and likely cache-resident

idea: add __launch_bounds__(384,2) to encourage higher residency assumptions
justification: tests whether compiler reduces registers under more aggressive residency target

idea: port 4096-square winner and add __launch_bounds__(384,1)
justification: combine proven K=4096 structure with explicit launch guidance

idea: port 4096-square winner and promote RHS tensor maps to L2_128B
justification: square-port may expose rhs-panel cache benefit on small N

idea: port 4096-square winner with wait depth 0
justification: test more aggressive latency bias on the square winner

idea: port 4096-square winner with wait depth 2
justification: test deeper overlap on the square winner

idea: port 4096-square winner with output padding 16
justification: alter bank mapping while keeping meta8+pacing structure

idea: port 4096-square winner with output tensor map L2_256B
justification: adds a write-side locality hint atop the winning structure

idea: port 4096-square winner with only the 100ns nanosleep
justification: isolate early pacing component of double-nanosleep win
